title: A master die (hexagonal, like a coin die) with a Greek cross struck into its face. Every instance of the entity is struck from the same die — the definition is the master. The cross represents the four governed operations: CreateInstance, Fire, Inspect, Update.
conceptualBridge: The struck die means every Precept instance is structurally identical because all are struck from the same immutable definition, just as coins from a die bear identical marks.
decision: Removed: user manually rejected (weight=0, review status=rejected, note: 'the cross looks too medical'); avg 3.8 also below the 4.0 threshold.
